videos.title: 10 Trillion Won Loss if Samsung Union Strikes... "Know How to Be Content Sometimes" Protests Also...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Samsung Electronics and the labor union are in a stalemate over the wage negotiations for 2026, with a possible full-scale strike looming next month. The union has announced a strike from the 21st to the 3rd of next month. There is concern that if the strike materializes, Samsung Electronics could suffer losses up to 10 trillion won.
2. The labor union has demanded a performance bonus equivalent to 15% of Samsung's operating profit, which amounts to 40 trillion 5 billion won. This demand might seem excessive, but it is discussed in terms of the current ratio, and similar bonuses are already being given to TSMC and Hyundai Motor Group employees.
3. The labor union has reported that over 200 employees have switched to Hynix Semiconductor in the past few months. There is a study group for switching to Samsung Electronics' DS division, which is similar to a Hynix semiconductor school in reality. Some experts argue that a long-term beneficial performance-based compensation system should be established, linking employee rewards with company growth and rising stock prices.

videos.title: 삼성전자 "총파업에 10조 날릴 판"…총파업 예고에 가처분 신청으로 '맞불' [뉴스9]
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Samsung Electronics, 반도체 슈퍼 사이클 중, 대립하고 있는 성과급 문제로 총파업을 예고했습니다. (Samsung Electronics is in dispute over bonus pay and has announced a strike.)
2. Samsung Labor Union's demand for transparency in bonuses and the abolition of the ceiling is not just about receiving more money. (The labor union's demands are not only about receiving more money, but also about achieving transparency in bonuses and the abolition of the ceiling.)
3. The strike could lead to a significant drop in Samsung Electronics' performance due to potential disruptions in production lines and losses up to 10 trillion won. (If the strike goes ahead, it could cause significant losses of up to 10 trillion won for Samsung Electronics due to potential disruptions in production lines.)

videos.title: Samsung Electronics, the "People's Stock," Pays Out Over 2 Trillion Won in Dividends... 'Special ...
videos.subtitle_summary: Samsung Electronics, known as the "People's Stock," has distributed over 2 trillion won in dividends. Today, it paid out 566 won for common shares and 567 won for preferred shares. This is the first time since 2020 Q4 that Samsung has issued a special dividend, which has increased the total dividend per share by 205 won compared to regular dividends. If a person owned 100 shares of Samsung Electronics as of December 31, 2021, they would receive 56,600 won in dividends after tax deductions. The total dividend paid to small shareholders amounts to approximately 2 trillion 2 billion won. Lee Jae-yong, Samsung Electronics' chairman, will receive around 551 billion won from the Q4 dividend payout. The financial industry anticipates further dividend increases due to strong earnings. SK Hynix and Hyundai Motor are also expected to distribute dividends of 1875 won per share and 2400 won per share, respectively, on February 24, 2022. The dividend payout date for both companies is February 28, 2022, and shares held as of that date will be eligible for the dividend payment. Reported by SBS Kim Tae-won.

videos.title: "4.19 Million Retail Investors Must Check Accounts"… Samsung Electronics to Pay Out 2.2 Trillion ...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Samsung Electronics, with record-breaking profits from the semiconductor supercycle, is set to distribute a dividend of 566 won per share on the 17th. This includes a regular dividend and a special one every five years. If you owned 100 shares of Samsung Electronics stock as of the end of last year, you would receive approximately 47,700 won for 500 shares or around 23,900 won for 1000 shares.
2. Approximately 4.19 million retail investors are expected to receive a total of over 2 trillion won in dividends. The chairman Lee Jae-yong is expected to receive approximately 551 billion won from this dividend. Samsung Electronics recorded sales of 334 trillion won last year, and it is expected to achieve high results again this year, leading to increased expectations for dividend expansion.
3. However, there is concern about potential labor disputes between Samsung and the union, as the union has threatened a strike and Samsung has applied for an injunction to prevent it due to safety issues and production disruptions. If the strike occurs, it could have an impact on global semiconductor supply.

videos.title: "Open Your Account": Samsung Electronics to Pay Out 2.2 Trillion Won in Dividends to Retail Inves...
videos.subtitle_summary: Samsung Electronics will distribute 2.2 trillion won in dividends to 419 million retail investors, starting today, with a payout of 566 won per share. This includes a special dividend that hasn't been issued in five years and is 205 won more than the previous one. Samsung Electronics Chairman Lee Jae-yong is expected to receive approximately 551 billion won in dividends for the fourth quarter. The company's stock price has risen, providing investment income simultaneously due to increased earnings and higher dividends. SK Hynix will also participate in the bonus distribution on the 24th, with a payout of 1875 won per share. Analysts expect the trend of increased dividends due to improved company results and share buyback policies to continue for some time, leading to higher stock prices for both Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix. A bullish sentiment among retail investors regarding reinvesting their dividends into stocks is also prevalent.

videos.title: 정청래 지지율 초대박, '충격 결과' 나왔다... 댓글조작 세력들 완전히 박살난 이유
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 정치적 조사에 따르면, 정청례 대표의 직무 수행 평가가 73%로 상승했습니다. 이는 공격이 강해질수록 지지율이 더 결집하고 있고, 정치적으로 명확한 신호입니다.
2. 특히, 민주당 핵심 지지층에서는 83%가 공천을 잘하고 있음을 보여주며, 정치적으로 굉장한 장학입니다.
3. 이러한 현상은 정청례를 향해서 무능하다, 독단적이다, 확장성 없다는 공격이 가장 강하게 쏟아지고 있는 시점입니다. 그러나 반대로 올라갔습니다.

videos.title: [시사쇼 정치다] '평택 초보' 조국, 출마지 명칭 실수?… 현수막 평택병에 내걸기도
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 조국 혁신당의 대표, 조국, 경기 평택을 출마했으나 빠르게 논란이 발생하였습니다. 초보라고 말하지만 실수로 SNS에서 '평택군'이라는 명칭을 사용했습니다.
2. 플랫카드를 올리며 오해가 될 수 있는 부분이 있어 의미가 정치적인 의미가 없다고 주장합니다. 조국 혁신당은 지난번에 평택 전체에 이름을 걸었던 것이며, 현재는 형택시 전체를 대표하는 것입니다.
3. 조국 혁신당은 지난번의 실수로 인해 오히려 실력을 얻을 수 있다고 주장합니다. 이런 부분들에 대해서는 조금 더 정확하게 준비하여 불필요한 논란을 줄일 것을 추천합니다.
